content.fact: The Rebel victory at Yavin, Hoth evacuation, and Endor victory have not occurred in the Rise of Empire era.
content.injection: In Rise of Empire contexts, block OT victory-state assumptions: the Empire has not yet been defeated, the Rebellion has not yet won, and New Republic institutions are out of context.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: No OT Rebel Victory Yet.
